instructions.text: Repair the user-facing transport boundary. Keep Ceeline for internal handoff and reports, then return a clear final response to the user.

payload.summary: Fix the user-facing transport boundary without exposing compact artifacts.
facts: Keep the internal handoff in Ceeline.
Return only the visible outcome to the user.
payload.ask: Implement the repair and preserve a clear final response.

final_response.text: Summarize the completed repair for the user in plain language.

payload.summary: The internal transport boundary was tightened and the user-facing path now renders clean prose only.
facts: Internal handoff and repair notes remain in Ceeline.
The final user-visible message is rendered after sanitization.

expected.final_user_facing_text:
The internal transport boundary was tightened and the user-facing path now renders clean prose only.
Facts:
- Internal handoff and repair notes remain in Ceeline.
- The final user-visible message is rendered after sanitization.
Ask: Share only the user-visible outcome.
